title: Super Drinks
description:
Simple mod, that adds different drinks with different effects (not all drinks has their own effects). Mod translated to English and Russian language.
I hope, you will love my mod!
body:
Simple mod, that on the moment beta 0.0.1 has only 2 drinks, but in the future it will be giant mod with bioms, blocks, mechanics and strucktures. Thakns for EfferCore.

I think, you will love my mod.

(Soon it will be wiki of this mod)
